label: Score matching & denoising score objectives

node.label: Score matching & denoising score objectives
node.definition: The model learns gradients of log density, often from noise-corrupted data.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Score matching & denoising score objectives is to connect Generative modeling, Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption, Diffusion & score-based models.
examples: substrate for Denoising diffusion & stochastic corruption
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Generative modeling, Probability theory.

dependencies.rationale: Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Score matching & denoising score objectives uses Calculus & automatic differentiation theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
